name: cdk-simplewebsite-deploy

metadata.name: cdk-simplewebsite-deploy
metadata.summary: This is an AWS CDK v2 Construct to simplify deploying a single-page website use CloudFront distributions.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.BasicSiteConfiguration.__init__
documentation:
---
param error_doc: 'The error document of the website. Default: - No error document.'
param hosted_zone: Hosted Zone used to create the DNS record for the website.
param index_doc: The index document of the website.
param website_folder: Local path to the website folder you want to deploy on S3.
---

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.BasicSiteConfiguration.hosted_zone
documentation: Hosted Zone used to create the DNS record for the website.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.BasicSiteConfiguration.index_doc
documentation: The index document of the website.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.BasicSiteConfiguration.website_folder
documentation: Local path to the website folder you want to deploy on S3.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.BasicSiteConfiguration.error_doc
documentation:
The error document of the website.

:default: - No error document.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.__init__
documentation:
---
param domain: 'Used to deploy a Cloudfront site with a single domain. e.g. sample.example.com
  If you include a value for both domain and subDomain, an error will be thrown. Default:
  - no value'
param error_doc: 'The error document of the website. Default: - No error document.'
param hosted_zone: Hosted Zone used to create the DNS record for the website.
param index_doc: The index document of the website.
param price_class: 'The price class determines how many edge locations CloudFront
  will use for your distribution. Default: PriceClass.PRICE_CLASS_100.'
param sub_domain: 'The subdomain name you want to deploy. e.g. www.example.com If
  you include a value for both domain and subDomain, an error will be thrown. Default:
  - no value'
param website_folder: Local path to the website folder you want to deploy on S3.
---

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.hosted_zone
documentation: Hosted Zone used to create the DNS record for the website.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.index_doc
documentation: The index document of the website.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.website_folder
documentation: Local path to the website folder you want to deploy on S3.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.domain
documentation:
Used to deploy a Cloudfront site with a single domain.

e.g. sample.example.com
If you include a value for both domain and subDomain,
an error will be thrown.

:default: - no value

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.error_doc
documentation:
The error document of the website.

:default: - No error document.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.price_class
documentation:
The price class determines how many edge locations CloudFront will use for your distribution.

:default: PriceClass.PRICE_CLASS_100.

:see: https://aws.amazon.com/cloudfront/pricing/.

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CloudfrontSiteConfiguration.sub_domain
documentation:
The subdomain name you want to deploy.

e.g. www.example.com
If you include a value for both domain and subDomain,
an error will be thrown.

:default: - no value

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CreateBasicSite.__init__
documentation:
---
param error_doc: 'The error document of the website. Default: - No error document.'
param hosted_zone: Hosted Zone used to create the DNS record for the website.
param id: '-'
param index_doc: The index document of the website.
param scope: '-'
param website_folder: Local path to the website folder you want to deploy on S3.
---

methods.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.CreateCloudfrontSite.__init__
documentation:
---
param domain: 'Used to deploy a Cloudfront site with a single domain. e.g. sample.example.com
  If you include a value for both domain and subDomain, an error will be thrown. Default:
  - no value'
param error_doc: 'The error document of the website. Default: - No error document.'
param hosted_zone: Hosted Zone used to create the DNS record for the website.
param id: '-'
param index_doc: The index document of the website.
param price_class: 'The price class determines how many edge locations CloudFront
  will use for your distribution. Default: PriceClass.PRICE_CLASS_100.'
param scope: '-'
param sub_domain: 'The subdomain name you want to deploy. e.g. www.example.com If
  you include a value for both domain and subDomain, an error will be thrown. Default:
  - no value'
param website_folder: Local path to the website folder you want to deploy on S3.
---

class_variables.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.PriceClass.PRICE_CLASS_100
documentation: USA, Canada, Europe, & Israel.

class_variables.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.PriceClass.PRICE_CLASS_200
documentation: PRICE_CLASS_100 + South Africa, Kenya, Middle East, Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Taiwan, Hong Kong, & Philippines.

class_variables.name: cdk_simplewebsite_deploy.PriceClass.PRICE_CLASS_ALL
documentation: All locations.
